$comment: Single source of truth for IP-leak guardrails. Consumed by scripts/check-bundle-ip-leaks.mjs (webapp), scripts/check-npm-tarball.mjs (npm prepublish), and the public-repo GitHub Action template at .lovable/ci-templates/ip-leak-check.yml. See mem://strategy/spec-publication-boundary.md.
allowlist_note: AARM Core R1-R9 references are a public standard (aarm.dev). The 'Rule [A-Z][0-9]' pattern intentionally does not match 'R1'..'R9' alone.
